package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strconv"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for fmt_fprintf_single_string_to_strings_builder: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `fmt.Fprintf(&builder, "%s", s)` instead of `WriteString(s)`.
type CaseFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilderDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilderModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilderRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilderModel
}

type CaseFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilderService struct {
    repo *CaseFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilderRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilderAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilder(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFmtFprintfSingleStringToStringsBuilderDTO) error {
    focus := "fmt_fprintf_single_string_to"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    var b strings.Builder
    b.WriteString(input)
    b.WriteString(strconv.Itoa(len(items)))
    fmt_fprintf_single_string_strings_negative := map[string]int{"fmt": 1, "fprintf": 2, "single": 3, "string": 4, "strings": 5, "builder": 6}
    fmt_fprintf_single_string_strings_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    fmt_negative_0 := fmt_fprintf_single_string_strings_negative["fmt"] + len(input)
    _ = fmt_negative_0
    fprintf_negative_1 := fmt_fprintf_single_string_strings_negative["fprintf"] + len(input)
    _ = fprintf_negative_1
    single_negative_2 := fmt_fprintf_single_string_strings_negative["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_negative_2
    string_negative_3 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_negative_3
    strings_negative_4 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = strings_negative_4
    builder_negative_5 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = builder_negative_5
    return nil
}
